subject: Sound Journey Facilitator | RAV Vast Meditation Sessions
body:
Dear Mandali team,

I facilitate immersive sound journeys using RAV Vast - a resonant steel instrument with deep therapeutic tones, ideal for silence retreats and meditation practice.

My background:

  • 4-year residency facilitating sunset meditation sessions at Villa Porta (Lake Maggiore luxury hotel)
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist
  • Greece's Got Talent appearance (4 YES votes)

→ RAV Vast Sound Journey

I offer:

  • Sound bath sessions for retreat guests (minimal setup: RAV + voice + looper)
  • Sunrise/sunset meditation accompaniment
  • RAV Vast introduction workshop

Your focus on silence and spiritual practice resonates deeply with my work. I'm available for 2026 collaborations and happy to discuss format and logistics.

Warm regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
linktr.ee/flutur

subject: Artist Application | Wellbeing Festival July 2026 | Sound Journey Facilitator
body:
Dear Wellbeing Festival team,

I noticed Nikolaos Unalome facilitated Sound Healing at your 2025 edition. I'd love to contribute to the 2026 festival as a sound journey facilitator.

I'm a RAV Vast endorsed artist with a focus on therapeutic sound experiences:

  • 4-year residency creating sunset ceremonies at Lake Maggiore luxury hotel
  • Greece's Got Talent appearance (4 YES votes)
  • Collaborative release with Equanimous (100M+ streams artist)

→ Sound Journey Sample

I can offer:

  • Sound bath / meditation sessions
  • Accompaniment at the UNESCO site (acoustic setup)
  • Workshop: Introduction to RAV Vast & Sound Meditation

Being Greek-speaking and based in the region, I'm available for the full July 3-13 festival window.

In gratitude,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
linktr.ee/flutur

subject: RAV Vast Endorsed Artist | Pangonia 2026 + Monthly Meetups
body:
Dear Pangonia team,

RAV Vast endorsed artist here. I'd love to connect with the Pangonia community - both for the 2026 festival (July 15-19) and your monthly Berlin meetups.

My journey:

  • From busking on Lake Maggiore → Greece's Got Talent (4 YES) → 4-year sunset ceremony residency at luxury hotel
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist
  • Collab with Equanimous (Gravitas Recordings, 100M+ streams)
  • Live looping: RAV Vast + guitar + vocals + drums (versatile setup)

→ Who Is Flutur - My Journey
→ RAV Vast Sound Journey

I'd love to:

  • Join a monthly meetup first to connect with the community
  • Offer a sunset concert slot or sound journey at Pangonia 2026
  • Facilitate a workshop: Live Looping with RAV Vast

When is the next Berlin meetup? I'd like to attend and introduce myself in person.

Warm regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
linktr.ee/flutur

subject: Artist Application | Healing Stage | Sound Journey + Live Looping Workshop
body:
Dear Evolve team,

I resonate deeply with Evolve's 100% sober, conscious approach. I'd love to contribute to your 2026 edition as both performer and workshop facilitator.

My offering:

  • RAV Vast endorsed artist - therapeutic sound journeys
  • 4-year sunset ceremony residency at Lake Maggiore hotel
  • Greece's Got Talent (4 YES votes)
  • One-man orchestra: voice, guitar, RAV Vast, drums, live looping
  • Collab with Equanimous (Gravitas Recordings)

→ Sound Journey Sample

I propose a dual contribution:

  • Healing Stage: Sound bath / meditation sessions
  • Workshop: "Building Layers" - Live looping with RAV Vast & voice
  • Sunrise/sunset ceremonies

I saw Rob Ginero facilitates handpan workshops - would love to connect with that healing music community.

In gratitude,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
linktr.ee/flutur

subject: Sunset Concert Fusion | RAV Vast + Electronic | Booking Inquiry
body:
Hi Sunset Hill team,

I discovered your "Sunset Concert Fusion" series - classical/neoclassical/ambient electronic meets sunset. This is exactly my sound.

My format: RAV Vast (steel tongue drum) + live looping + electronic elements via Ableton Push. Ambient electronic meets live acoustic - perfect for your infinity pool setting.

Background:

  • 4-year sunset session residency at Lake Maggiore luxury hotel
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist
  • Greece's Got Talent (4 YES votes)
  • Collab with Equanimous (Anjunadeep/Gravitas vibe)

→ Sunset Sound - RAV on Melodic House

I'm available for 2026 booking and interested in a residency or series of sessions. Happy to discuss format, dates, and logistics.

Warm regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
linktr.ee/flutur

subject: Sound Journey Facilitator | Ecstatic Dance Cooldown | RAV Vast
body:
Dear Shanti Space team,

I facilitate meditative sound journeys with RAV Vast - perfect for your monthly Kirtans & Ecstatic Dance events, especially the cooldown/integration phase.

Background:

  • 4-year sunset ceremony residency at Lake Maggiore hotel
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist
  • Greece's Got Talent (4 YES votes)
  • Self-taught sound healing with years of practical experience

→ Sound Journey Sample

I can offer:

  • Sound bath / cooldown for Ecstatic Dance events
  • Kirtan accompaniment with RAV Vast
  • Workshop: RAV Vast & Meditation for Beginners

I'm available for 2026 collaborations and happy to discuss a trial session or guest appearance at one of your monthly events.

In gratitude,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
